{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(def filtered-prs (filter (fn [pr] (not (nil? (:closes_linear pr)))) merged-prs))
(def results (map (fn [pr]
                   (let [linear-id (:closes_linear pr)]
                     (if-let [linear-issue (first (linear_issues {:id linear-id}))]
                       (when (not= (:state linear-issue) "done")
         …(+198)
